# Ike Knowledge Base

> The full-cycle knowledge base: this set's change set alone, assembled
> and classified by ike:kb-assemble and installed into the data-source
> directory for verification in Komet. Ledger-only by doctrine
> (IKE-Network/ike-issues#909, #921): the Tinkar starter data was a
> one-time input whose value is captured in the ledger's declarations,
> so the store is single-version by construction — every chronology at
> the inception stamp pair, exactly what LedgerGatesIT's whole-store
> stamp gate pins. Verification edits are captured under the installed
> store's changeSets directory and feed the next iteration as CHANGESET
> file inputs below.

## Other

- [Dependencies (SBOM)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-kb/dependencies.html.md)
